title: Session 00–01 — Pods, Festival, Quake
bodyText:
**TL;DR: The party burned infected plant-pods near Koviz, then festival day erupted in quake, vines, and spores — everyone left infected and headed for the clinic.**

# What happened
- [[pc-eddy|Eddy]], [[pc-varen|Varen]], and [[pc-felson|Felson]] found strange plant-pods near [[koviz]] — deep roots, dangerous airborne particles — and fought off infected, mindless-aggressive animals that decomposed into the cracks when killed.
- They **burned the pods**; each held a magic mushroom (Felson: better-torch; Eddy: ~3 uses of bonus-action invisibility).
- Festival day ended with an earthquake, a booming drone, and an eruption of vines + spores in the city: infected rodents, a giant river toad, and a **vine humanoid** hidden in the flora.
- Everyone was left battered, exhausted, coughing — **infected** — and headed for the clinic.
- Felsen was seen talking to a noble-looking gentleman ([[thread-noble-gentleman]]).

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The plant-pods — **burned**; each yielded a magic mushroom.
- The party is **infected** — headed for the clinic.
- Felsen's noble-looking gentleman — who is he? ([[thread-noble-gentleman]])

# Threads
[[koviz]] · [[thread-noble-gentleman]]
